_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of RAS Dependency for BRAF Alterations Using Cancer Genomic Databases.

_contextSnippet: 119 538 patients (female/male ratio: 1.1) from GENIE and cBioPortal database were included in the study
details: Database contained 119,538 patients with female/male ratio of 1.1, providing comprehensive genomic alteration data for BRAF classification analysis
